name: statusmon
description: Pokemon companion statusline for Claude Code that displays a sprite which gains experience and levels up as you complete coding sessions, with stats fetched from the PokeAPI and persisted across runs.
notes: Code is MIT but the repo bundles Pokémon sprite PNGs and a Game Freak-derived font; runtime also fetches sprites from PokeAPI. Listed for reference; not redistributable due to bundled third-party IP.

security.quarantine_reason: Bundles Pokémon sprite assets and Pokemon-style font likely derived from Nintendo/Game Freak IP without license.
